issues.title: No explanation of what 'Analysis' means
issues.description: A first-time visitor navigates to 'Analysis' but doesn't know how it differs from 'Dashboard'. The subtitle 'Deep dive into crime patterns' is vague.
reproduction_steps: Look for explanation of what this page offers
issues.expected: A brief explanation: 'This page provides deeper analysis of crime patterns, trends, and comparisons'
issues.actual: Vague subtitle 'Deep dive into crime patterns'

issues.title: No empty state for Key Insights
issues.description: If overview data is loading or unavailable, the Key Insights section may show dashes or empty values without explanation.
issues.expected: Loading skeleton for Key Insights section
issues.actual: No loading state; shows dashes during loading

summary: Analysis page is clear but first-time visitors don't know how it differs from Dashboard.
